TRADE_EXECUTED: Your trade has been executed successfully
TRADE_OUTCOME_FINAL: Your trade {tradeId} has reached a final status: {status}
SIGNAL_CREATED: A new signal has been created
SIGNAL_PREMIUM_UNLOCKED: Premium signal access granted for provider {providerId}
SIGNAL_PREMIUM_EXPIRED: Your premium subscription for provider {providerId} has expired
RISK_ALERT: Risk alert: Your position exceeds the risk threshold
PRICE_STALE_WARNING: Price data for {asset} is stale. Trade execution is paused.
LIQUIDITY_WARNING: Low liquidity detected for {asset}. Your trade may experience slippage.
PAYMENT_SCHEDULED: Your payment has been scheduled for {date}
PAYMENT_EXECUTED: Your scheduled payment has been executed
PAYMENT_CANCELLED: Your scheduled payment has been cancelled
PAYMENT_REMINDER: Reminder: You have a payment scheduled for {date}
